findings.Problem: TestHistoryCmd_MergesLegacyAndShards does not verify the merged order (shards before legacy) or that the legacy file is not mutated
findings.Fix: Assert record ordering and verify legacy file content is unchanged after query
findings.Evidence: Test only asserts both packages appear in output, not order or non-mutation

findings.Problem: No test exercises LoadAll when the legacy file exists but is unreadable
findings.Fix: Add a test with an unreadable legacy file and assert the error propagation
findings.Evidence: TestLoadAll_MergesShardsAndLegacy only tests happy path; TestLoadAll_AbsentBothIsEmpty tests absent files

findings.Problem: No test exercises LoadShards with a dir path containing glob metacharacters
findings.Fix: Add a test with a dir containing [brackets] and verify records are still found

findings.Problem: No test exercises an unreadable shard file (permission error) to verify LoadShards behavior
findings.Fix: Add a test case with a 000-permission .jsonl file and assert the error or skip behavior
findings.Evidence: TestLoadShards_MergesAllMonthlyFiles and siblings only test happy paths and absent dir
